kiasort_clusters.name: kiasort_directory
kiasort_clusters.documentation: The relative path (within the ndi.session) to the KIASORT output directory that was imported.

kiasort_clusters.name: curated_output_MD5_checksum
kiasort_clusters.documentation: The MD5 checksum of the KIASORT unifiedLabels.h5 file (the per-spike unit assignments). Used to detect whether the sort/curation has changed since a previous import.
